artists.pernet: Michel Abeel (r.n. Henri Michel Van Den Abeel)(acc), with unidentified(p), (xyl/chimes), (dm).

artist.info: r.n. Henri Michel Van Den Abeel

artists.pernet: Kurt Abraham(cl, ts), Otto Türksch(tp), Hans Kummert(tb, vln), Lou Logist(fl, ts), Primo Angeli(p), Franz Fijal Lipinsky(g), Gustav Lück(b), Albert Dekker(dm)

song.compo: Ich hab' dich und Du hast mich
Wann wirst du wieder bei Mir sein
Wann wirst du wieder bei Mir sein

artists.pernet: Omit Latin-percussions.

albums.album: "THE BRUSSELS WORLD'S FAIR SALUTES THE ARTIE SHAW ORCHESTRA & GRAMERCY 5"

songs.note: Note: Omega Disk OML1021 = OSL21, Mecca OSL21, Sutton SU211, SSU211. Omega Disk OSRS-142 as by THE BAY FIVE. All tracks except "Moonglow" on Phonoband C5032. Prob. all tracks on FM Veri Sonics {2LP}VS-101. "Stardust", Summit", "Temptation", "'s Wonderful", "Begin", "Cross", "Dancing" on Omegatape {tape}MTF3-8017, {tape}SFR3-4042. "Begin The Beguine" on Omega Disk OSL58. (2) also on Baccarola [Baccarola International] 77947ZT. (3) also on Saga ERO08013. (5) also on Boulevard 4011.

song.compo: When The Quail Comes Back To San Quentin

artists.pernet: Usual Francis Bay personnel.
Sidney Bechet(ss), Jacky Jun(ldr, as), Emile Peiffer(tp), Roger Asselberghs(bs, cl), Johnny Hot(p), Paul Karthy(g), Benoit Quersin(b), Jean Delange(dm).

albums.album: SIDNEY BECHET AND THE JUMP COLLEGE
ORCHESTRE DAVID BEE AND HIS RED BEANS (*)

notes.note: Note:(*) This band's name is engraved into the wax of one of the white-label test pressing. "Bernard Roux" appearing on these test-pressings, is in fact the name of the wax-disc manufacturer. According to Félix Faecq, these recordings may have been released on French "Gipsy" label..

artists.pernet: Unidentified personnel, probably similar to the next.

albums.album: "TIEROLFF FOR BAND" - THE BELGIAN AIR FORCE BAND Cond. Captain Alain Crépin

song.compo: Marching Through America (with When Johnny Come Marching Home, Old Soldiers Never Die, Marine's March, Old folks At Home & Dixie)

artists.pernet: Lou Bennett (r.n. Jean-Louis Benoit)(Ham-org), Philip Catherine(g), Larry Ritchie(dm)
Lambert "Jef" Candrix(ldr, cl, as, ts, bs), Maurice Gerin(tp-1, vln-2), Alex Sorkine(tb-1, bjo-3, poss. vln-3) Nico de Rooij(p), Guillaume "Lommeke" Vanderborght(dm-1, tp-2).

albums.album: Tuschinsky's Berceley's(sic)Jazz Band. Dirigent: Max Tak

songs.note: All Vox issues are "made in Germany", these belonging to the H10000 series were pressed for Dutch market.

notes.note: Notes: The name of Tuschinsky used on label comes from an engagement of The Berkeley's (correct name) at famous Dutch dance hall of the above name. Max Tak's name appears only for commercial reasons, as "supervisor" of these sessions. ~All Vox issues are "made in Germany", these belonging to the H10000 series were pressed for Dutch market. ~Most of the vocal tracks are of mild interest.

artists.pernet: Randy Bernsen(g), Toots Thielemans(hca), Taras Kovayl(p), Jeff Carswell(b), Mark Griffith(dm), Othello Molineaux(steel-dm), Norman Arnold(perc), Rita Quintiro, Wendy Pederson(v).

songs.note: Note: other tracks from this CD are without Thielemans.

artists.pernet: Robert Verelst(ldr, cond, arr-1), Fred Van der Meiren, Rudi Bloemmen, Roger De Roeck, Jef Van der Seypen, Dirk De Roeck, Patrik Sas(tp), Paul van Wouwe, Rudy Fonteyne, Jules De Potter, Ben Torfs(tb), Eddy Dedrie(btb), Gan van Wouwe(as, fl), Eddy Coeck(as, cl, fl), Mon Peeters(ts), Harry Broeckmeyer(ts, fl, cl), Frans Teugels(bs), Jacky Coppejans(p), Alain Smits(g), Luc Chatlin(elb), Jos Gerinckx(dm), Peter Van Woensel(perc).

albums.album: "A BAY OF CLOUDS" - 10 JAAR BOOM BIG BAND

artists.pernet: Paul Schoovaerts(cond), Gaston Cornelis, Jan De Coninck, Albert Govaert, Eric Hernalsteen, Christian Pepermans, Freddy Van Calsteren, Guillaume Van Leemputten(tp), René Delhaye, Constant De Snijder, Daniel Van Calsteren, Johnny Verhoeven, Jan Walravens(tb), Johnny Bulinckx, Dirk Davidts, Guido De Ranter, Arthur De Rijcke, Laurent Schoovaerts, Gust Stevens, Robert Van Beneden, Gilbert Vanden Berghe, Adrien Van Halle, Daniel Verhulst(b-horn), Georges Coopmans, Pierre Hertoghe, Jean-Luc Huyens, Jan Kemps, Ilse Kemps, Marc Lambelin, Philippe Peeters, Edouard Schoovaerts, Véronique Van Beneden, Arthur Van Migerode, Christiane Vermeulen, Anne Walravens(cl), Alfons De Bruyne(bcl), Bernard Byl, Emile Desmet, Roger Verhaeren, Luc Verhoeven(fl), Fernand Burton(oboe), Paul Everaert(bassoon), Monique Cuyt, Anik De Snijder, Pierre De Snijder, Gerda Hernalsteen, Pascal Popelin, Vera Stas, Edouard Sterckx(saxes), Willy Wantier(bg), Philippe Schoovaerts(dm), Madi De Coninck(tymp), Daniel Demunter, Luc De Snijder, Frans Verhulst(perc), Tina Martin(?)(v-1).

notes.note: Note: "Perfect Rag" and "Home" from same session are without Rudi Balliu.

albums.album: KURT WIDMANN mit seinem Tanz Orchester

artists.pernet: John Witjes(ldr, ts) with unidentified personnel consisting of 2(tp), (tb), 3(sax), (p), (g), (b), (dm) + members of the German Hot Club Combo. No exact details.

artist.info: members of the German Hot Club Combo

artists.pernet: Fabrizio Cassol(as), Michel Hatzigeorgiou(el b, v), Stéphane Galland(dm). Guest drummers from Senegal: Doudou N'Diaye Rose, El Hadji N'Diaye Rose, Lamile N'Diaye Rose, Mame Youga N'Diaye Rose, Aly N'Diaye Rose, Tapha N'Diaye Rose, Mor Koumba N'Diaye Rose, Adama N'Diaye Rose, Abdoulaye Mbengue.
Philip Catherine(g), Jim Beard(keyb), Alfonso Johnson(elb), Rodney Holmes(dm).

Chris Joris(ldr, cymbals & Djembé, Likembé, Berimbau, fl, perc), Sam Versweyveld(tp, flh), Jeroen Van Herzeele(ts, ss), Ernst Vranckx(p), Chris Mentens(b): guests: Ben Ngabo(v, n'gmoa's), N'Fally Kouyaté(Kora).

artist.instr: ldr, cymbals & Djembé, Likembé, Berimbau, fl, perc

albums.album: "LIVE" AT THE JAZZ-MIDDELHEIM FESTIVAL & STOCKHOLM '97" - THE CHRIS JORIS EXPERIENCE

artists.pernet: Ben Sluis(ldr, as, fl-1), Erik Vermeulen(p), Piet Verbist(b), Eric Thielemans(dm).

notes.note: Note: according to the promotional literature accompanying this CD, drummer should be Dré Pallemaerts.
